_notes.infra: PostgreSQL (5434), Redis (6380), Go Gateway (18080), and Go Auth (18081) are managed by `docker compose up` in apps/Phoenix-Predict-Combined — not by Claude Preview. If any of those ports are not listening, run `cd apps/Phoenix-Predict-Combined && docker compose up -d` from the repo root. They were removed from this file because Claude Preview's pre-flight port check treats external docker binds as conflicts and refuses to start any server.
